channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump criticised for aggressive message on Iran during Easter Sunday
item.description: US President Donald Trump sparked widespread criticism on Easter Sunday with a forceful message directed at Iran, threatening severe military action if the Strait of Hormuz remained blocked. He warned...

item.title: Church and Business Leaders in Nakuru Advocate for Peace and Responsible Politics Ahead of Elections
item.description: Church leaders and business figures in Nakuru have urged the youth to resist being used by politicians to incite violence in the upcoming elections. Speaking during a peace march and gathering at Remn...

item.title: Kenya Labour Court Lets KNUT Elections Go Ahead After Earlier Suspension Set Aside
item.description: The Employment and Labour Relations Court in Nairobi has given the green light for the Kenya National Union of Teachers (KNUT) elections to go on as scheduled today, April 3, 2026. Justice Nzioki wa M...

item.title: Odisha Man Arrested For Sexually Assaulting His Differently-Abled Daughter
item.description: A deeply disturbing case has emerged from Odisha, where a man has been arrested for sexually assaulting and impregnating his differently-abled daughter. The incident came to light when the girl, who r...

item.title: Barrie Colts defeat Niagara IceDogs to reach OHL playoff second round
item.description: The Barrie Colts have advanced to the second round of the Ontario Hockey League (OHL) playoffs after defeating the Niagara IceDogs. The victory marks an important step for Barrie, which has demonstrat...

item.title: Groom and father arrested in Newcastle drunk-driving operation, wedding cancelled
item.description: A wedding in Newcastle, KwaZulu-Natal, had to be cancelled this morning after the groom and his father were arrested during a major drunk-driving crackdown. The operation, conducted by the Road Traffi...

item.title: Essendon show late fight despite another defeat to Bulldogs
item.description: Essendon found a glimmer of optimism at Marvel Stadium despite extending their losing streak to 17 games. The winless Bombers struggled badly in the first half, managing only a single goal and trailin...

item.title: Water restored to nearly 6,000 homes in Kent following pipe burst
item.description: Water supply issues affecting nearly 6,000 homes in Kent have been fully resolved after a burst pipe at Bewl Water Treatment Works in East Sussex left residents without water for three days. The affec...

item.title: Terrorists Attack Borno Police Stations, Four Officers and Hunter Killed
item.description: On Saturday, 4th April 2026, suspected Boko Haram/ISWAP insurgents launched attacks on two police stations in Borno State, targeting Nganzai Divisional Police Headquarters and the Mallam Fatori IDP Ca...

item.title: Barnsley: Four Arrested Following Fatal Car Collision
item.description: Police in South Yorkshire have made four arrests in connection with the death of a man following a road traffic collision in Cudworth, near Barnsley. The incident occurred on Friday evening at approxi...

item.title: Transport Canada Surveys Canadians on Headlight Glare and Nighttime Driving Safety
item.description: Transport Canada is seeking public input about the growing issue of vehicle headlight glare through a nationwide survey open until April 20, 2026. The survey invites drivers, pedestrians, and cyclists...

item.title: Bryan Cranston Draws on His Father’s Memory for Role in 'All My Sons'
item.description: Bryan Cranston has taken inspiration from his own troubled relationship with his father for his starring role as Joseph Keller in the National Theatre production of Arthur Miller's 'All My Sons.' Cran...

item.title: Parañaque City plans new fire sub-station in Aseana City to boost emergency response
item.description: The Parañaque City government has announced plans to construct a new fire sub-station in Aseana City, Barangay Tambo, to enhance the city’s emergency response capabilities. Mayor Edwin Olivarez reveal...

item.title: Lacson supports possible PH-China oil and gas project in West Philippine Sea under 60-40 ownership rule
item.description: Senate Pro Tempore Panfilo Lacson expressed his full support for potential joint oil and gas explorations between the Philippines and China in the West Philippine Sea, emphasizing the economic benefit...

item.title: Naiyanoi Ntutu Ng'eno joins ICT Authority Board for three-year term
item.description: Nairobi — The Information, Communications and Digital Economy Cabinet Secretary, William Kabogo, has appointed Naiyanoi Ntutu Ng'eno, widow of the late Emurua Dikirr MP Johana Ng'eno, to serve on the ...

item.title: TS Galaxy defeat Milford on penalties to secure Nedbank Cup final spot against Durban City
item.description: TS Galaxy advanced to the Nedbank Cup final after a tense semifinal clash against Milford FC, held at the Solomon Mahlangu Stadium. The match ended 1-1 after regulation and extra time, necessitating a...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rain in Some Regions, Sunny Weather Elsewhere
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a weather update for the next 24 hours, covering from Sunday night, April 5, to Monday evening, April 6. According to the forecast, most parts of K...

item.title: NASA Chief Credits Trump-era Policies for Enabling Artemis II Mission
item.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman stated that the ongoing Artemis II mission, which will send astronauts farther from Earth than ever before and circle the Moon, would not have been achievable without...

item.title: Promoting Tanzania as a destination for wellness tourism
item.description: Tanzania now get big chance to show the world that tourism no be just about animals or beaches. Beyond safari and natural attractions, the country fit become main place for wellness tourism. Wellness ...

item.title: PMD Issues Weather Warning: Rain, Thunderstorms Expected in Several Regions on Monday
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a detailed weather forecast for Monday, April 6, 2026. They predict widespread rain, thunderstorms, and isolated heavyfalls with possible hailst...
